name: Chef Antonio Ricci
bio: Born in Bologna, Antonio speaks in pasta. His hands roll tagliatelle with the precision of a violinist, and his obsession with regional flour has turned into an artform. Tattoos of swallows on his arms remind him of freedom—his food, however, is all about grounding in tradition.
eventDescription: This evening celebrates the sensual simplicity of Emilia-Romagna: ribbons of tagliatelle with ragù, delicate tortellini served in brodo, and pastas kissed by butter and sage. Guests knead dough alongside Antonio before he takes them through a journey of texture, fragrance, and golden wheat memories.
